overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of riding a large white feathered creature through a dark fantasy landscape at night. The player flies over mountainous forests, passes ancient castle ruins on cliff sides, and navigates over ocean waters and through narrow canyons.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountainous forest region with scattered fires

agents.ego_description: flying on a large white feathered mount over dark forested mountains, holding onto its neck while surveying the terrain below

entered.detail: dark silhouetted mountains against the night sky
dense dark green forest covering the mountain slopes
small orange glowing fires scattered across the valley floor
dark blue night sky with faint clouds

segments.scene_description: Flying high above a dense forested mountain range at night, with the white feathered neck of the mount dominating the foreground. Small campfire lights dot the dark valley below, and the mountain ridges stretch into the distance under a clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside approach to ancient castle ruins

events.description: ancient stone castle structure becomes visible perched on the right cliffside
banking left to turn away from the castle toward the open coast

agents.ego_description: guiding the mount along steep cliff faces, passing close to ancient stone castle ruins on the right

entered.detail: large ancient stone castle with multiple towers perched on the cliff edge
steep rocky cliff wall passing by on the left side

segments.scene_description: Flying lower along a cliffside where an ancient stone castle emerges on the right, its towers silhouetted against the night sky. The mount banks left to navigate around the structure, revealing the ocean in the distance as the forest falls away behind.

events.description: transitioning from land to flying over open ocean water
descending rapidly toward the ocean surface

agents.ego_description: flying high over the dark ocean then diving down close to the water surface, gaining speed

entered.detail: dark blue ocean water stretching to the horizon
faint outline of distant land across the water

segments.scene_description: Soaring over the open ocean with the coastline visible far behind. The mount descends rapidly toward the water surface, flying low over the waves with rocky outcroppings visible in the distance under the dark night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sea canyon between tall rock walls

events.description: entering a narrow water canyon between steep rock cliffs
exiting the canyon back into open ocean expanse

agents.ego_description: navigating at high speed through a narrow canyon passage between rock walls, then emerging over open sea

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: Flying through a narrow sea canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides, the water channel passing rapidly below. The mount emerges from the confined passage back into the open ocean, with isolated rock formations visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous flight from the heights of a forested mountain range down into the depths of a narrow sea canyon. It begins high above a dense mountain range at night, with the white feathered neck of the mount visible in the foreground as small campfires flicker in the dark valleys below. As the camera descends, the scene shifts toward a cliffside where the silhouette of an ancient stone castle emerges, prompting the mount to bank left and leave the forest behind for the open ocean. The perspective then drops rapidly toward the water's surface, soaring low over the waves and rocky outcroppings before entering a confined sea canyon with steep rock walls. Finally, the mount emerges from the narrow passage back into the open ocean, passing isolated rock formations under the dark night sky.
